skills.name: Gaia's Veil
skills.description: While wearing a mantle, gain Windproof Lv3, Earplugs Lv3, Tremor Res Lv3, and Flinch Free.

levels.description: While wearing a mantle, gain Windproof Lv3, Earplugs Lv3, Tremor Res Lv3, and Flinch Free.

skills.name: True Gaia's Veil
skills.description: While wearing a mantle, gain Tremor Resistance Lv3, Earplugs Lv5, max Windproof, and Flinch Free.

levels.description: While wearing a mantle, gain Tremor Resistance Lv3, Earplugs Lv5, max Windproof, and Flinch Free.

skills.name: Recovery Up
skills.description: Increases the amount recovered when restoring health.

skills.name: Partbreaker
skills.description: Makes it easier to break or sever parts of large monsters.

skills.name: Coalescence
skills.description: Temporarily enhances attacks after recovering from blights or abnormal status.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +12, element attack power +30, and status buildup +5%.
While active, grants attack +15, element attack power +60, and status buildup +10%.
While active, grants attack +18, element attack power +90, and status buildup +15%.

skills.name: Health Boost
skills.description: Increases health.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.
